title: The Reincarnated Assassin is a Swordsmanship Genius
description: He lived his whole life as a leashed dog. A new life he has obtained. The leash has been cut, and the anger remains. Now he will live by his will and walk with his own feet. If anything blocks his way, even if it's a god, he will cut it down.
author: Geulgaemi

title: How to Live as a Wizard in a Magic School
description: Graduate student Lee Han. Born as the youngest of another world's magical family. -I will never go to school again! 'What is your goal?' 'Living leisurely for life...' 'Yes. You must feel your own talent. Go to the magic school Einlogard!' 'Lord!' If you graduate from the magic school, your life is guaranteed. Do your best to graduate!
author: Writing Machine
price: Free if you wait for a day

title: I Became a Nuisance in the Count's House
description: When I opened my eyes, I was in a novel. And I was in the body of the notorious nuisance of a Count's son. But, I can't just become a nuisance, can I?
author: Yuryeohan

title: The Necromancer School's Summoning Genius
description: After the '100-year war' between the Necromancer faction and the Priest faction. A prodigy who can overturn the power structure is born. “Am I a rare case? Am I talented?” Potential beyond imagination. He takes over his father's undead army and enters the great Necromancer school 'Kijen'. Even among the elites, a genius is a genius. The research community is turned upside down by the appearance of a new case, and professors can't leave him alone to become a direct disciple. Officials and executives from the entire kingdom are eager to recruit him. “Professor! When can I make a Lich?” “You should be moderately talented, you really crossed the line.” A genius among geniuses has appeared. Illustrator: ChyoChyo
author: IljeSagak
price: Free if you wait for 1 day

title: -99 Level Great Wizard
description: I finally returned, but my level is strange. But... it's actually good?
author: Last Swordsman
price: Free if you wait for 1 day

title: Byeongbaek's Youngest Son Was an Emperor
description: He became an emperor at a young age and was beheaded before he became an adult. It was a tragedy brought about by the fate of being the first noble magician. “Ian. Don't be born in the next life.” He thought everything was over with the cruel words of the rebel. He thought... “You are a symbol of peace. Where else would there be such glory in a humble body?” He became the youngest son of the Byeongbaek family, which was extinct 100 years ago. He is poor, ignorant, and destined to be sold to the border barbarians as a slave.
author: Gi Jun Seok
price: Free if you wait for a day

title: The Legendary Hero is an Academy Honor Student
description: There were five heroes who stood against Erebus, the primordial evil that brought the world to the brink of destruction. [Dragon Knight] Aron. [God's Blacksmith] Dueno. [Ancestor of the Nebula] Luna. [King of Wisdom] Lishinas. And finally me, [Hero of the Beginning] Kyle. After reincarnation, I found myself being praised as a great hero. "Except for me." Hero Record, a gift from God that records the achievements of heroes, is at the Hero Officer Academy. Let's enter there and find out why. "I might as well become an honor student there."
author: Yerona

title: Black Company Joseon
description: A military enthusiast, a steampunk fanatic, a reincarnated man who is crazy about all kinds of otaku. But his father is King Sejong? A ruler who is good at otaku, a son who is crazy about otaku, and many people with divergent vassals. The night of Joseon is full of overtime work lights again today.
author: Gukppong

title: Streaming of a Genius Archer
description: The youngest winner of the championship, a promising archer. Thought to be on a roll, but due to an unfortunate accident, he can never hold a bow again, the fallen genius archer Yoo Sang-hyun! He was even fired from the company he parachuted into, and to make a living, he becomes a game streamer, Almond... [You have chosen a bow.] Phew! Whooosh! [Headshot!] “Is the boss usually one shot?” His crazy talent shines again! 28 years old. High school graduate. Unemployed. Special skill is archery. The broadcasting genius returns, his delightful rebellion begins?! [Streaming of a Genius Archer]
author: MongMongKim
price: Free if you wait for 1 day

title: Streaming of a Reincarnated Genius
description: After shooting the last episode with tears, I remembered my previous life?
author: Lee Seo Jae
price: Free if you wait a day

title: Conquering Major League After Discharge
description: Enough of a life stained with gunpowder and blood. I have to play the baseball I've always wanted.
author: YunaPapa
price: Free if you wait a day

title: Disease That Kills If You Don't Debut
description: A 4th year civil service student, possessed by a strange body, returned to 3 years ago. And the sudden threat of the status window that appeared in front of him! [Sudden!] [Abnormal Status: 'Death if not debut' occurs!] The protagonist, who had to challenge the idol that was not in his fate because of the sudden death threat, has a great journal. ※Special Note: Sold idol data before possession
author: Baek Deok-su
price: Free if you wait a day

title: The Oriental Doctor, Returned from the Martial World
description: Han Yeowon, an ordinary Korean oriental medicine student, unexpectedly falls into the martial world and becomes a divine doctor? "Goodbye to the tedious martial world!" A slightly (?) special oriental doctor returns!
author: Sahyang Noru

title: First Year Max Level Manager
description: [Exclusive Serialization] The Midas of the entertainment industry, Jung Yoon-ho. He regresses as a first-year manager. The smooth life of the 'First Year Max Level Manager' starts now.
author: Hyun Shin

title: This Life is a Universal Superstar
description: [Exclusive Serialization] Sunwoo Joo, an idol aspirant who has both talent and effort in looks, singing, and composing. One day, a miracle came to him! "I will become a star that shines brighter than anyone." His terrible dancing skills are no longer a problem. Finally, a prepared idol who has everything. A monster rookie appears in the entertainment industry! This life is a universal superstar!
author: Son Yoon
price: Free if you wait for a day

title: The Traded Pitcher's Talent Explodes
description: Han Minwoo, a promising player with bad luck. Now he is being traded as he is no longer needed. ['Welcome to BnB, Han Minwoo!'] He can see the system of the BnB baseball game he played when he was young. And he can play the baseball he enjoyed again! [The Traded Pitcher's Talent Explodes]
author: Fire

title: Doctor Choi Tae Soo
description: “Yes. You should... be afraid of the patient. You should feel the fear... that makes your hands and feet tremble.” “…….” “You become a real doctor... when you don't run away from that.” “If you keep talking, the bleeding will continue.” Despite Tae Soo's rebellious tone soaked in urgency, the old man kept smiling. “There will be times... when you want to run away. When that happens, remember this moment... Remember that you are the only one... the patient can rely on.” The time when life and death intersected passed. After that!!!!!! The fate of an ordinary intern changed completely. If you can save them? If there is a possibility of saving them? You have to pick up the scalpel in any situation. A single unyielding belief is enough. Doctor Choi Tae Soo, he chose the path of a true surgeon.
author: Cho Seok Ho

title: Doctor Choi Daeho
description: Doctor Choi Daeho! A doctor who does not compromise with anyone and goes his own way. There is nothing more precious and expensive in the world than a patient's life.
author: Jo Seokho

title: Reincarnated as a Genius Actor from a National Intelligence Service Agent
description: A National Intelligence Service agent who dreamed of becoming an actor. He reincarnated into a strange boy's body. A new life, a new start. "···You're a genius at acting?" "Me?" Having lived as a spy all his life, he had unknowingly mastered acting.
author: Ryu Yeon Woo
price: Free if you wait for 1 day

title: God of Blackfield: Deadline
description: Kang Chan, the owner of a mysterious sense and excellent combat skills! But what the hell is this anxiety that is so oppressive that my heart is stiff! Thump! With a dull sound, the world turned all white. After trying to regain consciousness, when I reflected my face in the mirror on the wall, there was a weak high school student. Moreover, there are only guys who torment me around... 'I'll kill them all.' God of Blackfield! I don't know, but this is a word created by the enemy. It means a god who brings death!
author: Mujang

title: Namgung Se is a Martial Arts Genius and the Crown Prince
description: He swore to ruin Namgung Se even if he had to become a vengeful spirit. And the moment he plunged the sword into his heart without hesitation! [What are you trying to achieve by taking your own life, you damn brat!] A voice came from the sword that his mother had kept all her life. When his heavy eyelids lifted again, he had escaped from the long nightmare. Did my desperate wish reach the heavens. He had returned to when he was fifteen. An opportunity to correct a past filled with regret. He will ruin Namgung Se, who abandoned him, with his own hands.
author: Geuldeok-i
price: Free if you wait a day

title: The Best Martial Arts Instructor in the World
description: Seok Won Cho, the head of the Demon Cult, was a monster surpassing the Blood Cult Leader. Does anyone know who killed him? "Ha Moo Baek." "But, why are we talking about this..." "He's coming to our Myeongryongdae as an instructor" ...Damn. It's screwed!
author: Shin Ga

title: The Youngest Son of Eunhaesangdan
description: 『The Youngest Son of Eunhaesangdan』 Born as the best merchant in the world, Eun Seo Ho. Those who block his success, “Why is the martial arts alliance targeting me…….” “Because you've grown too big and it's annoying, so it's bothersome to the eye.” He went back to the day he started the business, and made a firm resolution not to regret in this life “I will bring you down with the money you guys have stepped on.” The march of the great merchant emperor, with a genius brain and outstanding martial arts talent, begins!
author: Hyangran
price: Free if you wait for 1 day

title: Ilwolmushin
description: Dokgohyeon, who led the Chamadae (斬魔隊), which was just a shield, and ended the war. But in the end, it was all a farce. "Master! Why are you doing this, really!" "Life is indeed strange." Not as Chamadaeju Dokgohyeon, but as the world's dumbest Dokgomyeong. Enough of enduring endlessly! I don't know if it's the right way (正道) or the evil way (邪道), I go my own way. But before that! There are too many guys in the world who need to be hit. You should get hit now. Embracing the martial arts of the vast sky in one body, the bumpy fight of Dokgomyeong to block the upcoming chaos and invasion of blood begins.
author: Injae

title: Doctor, Live Again
description: [Exclusive Serialization] Jin Cheon-hee, who was an orphan, but became a surgeon after terrible efforts. He was possessed into the martial arts world of the novel he was reading! "It's a relief that I'm a doctor. I can live as a doctor here." What appeared in front of him, who was relieved, was Cheonma Yeoha-ryun, the protagonist of the novel world in a critical condition. "Hey, since you saved my life, call me brother." The story of him becoming the best in the martial arts world by being called a brother by Cheonma.
author: Tae Sun

title: Shinma Daeje
description: The ten gates of magic, known as the sky of magic. When they gather their power, the world calls it Majun (Magic Palace). And now, in the holy land of all demons, the Shinma (God Demon) that will swallow the martial arts world opens its eyes.
author: Eungeom

title: Red Dragon Martial Emperor
description: Another legend he presents! 'Red Dragon Martial Emperor' The absolute ruler of the martial world, Lee Hwan, who dominated the martial world with overwhelming martial power and achieved the myth of invincibility, closes his eyes and enters eternal sleep... “Reincarnation...” Waking up in the body of a discarded prince, Lee Hwan laments that his era has been thoroughly erased. The era when everything of his, including the Great Wild Castle, and the traces of the Three Kings, his loyal subordinates, have all disappeared. “If you turn it back, that's it.” He regains everything he lost, and the era of the Martial Emperor, who will rule the world, begins again!
author: Cheonbong

title: Mudang Jingyeong
description: “I will do it with this child.” Kwak Yeon, who was sold to the external martial artist training school of the shaman faction at a young age for three nyang of silver. He begins to crave for ascending martial arts. Can he become a disciple of the main mountain by piercing through the needle hole-like gate that was barely allowed to the training students of the school? If you are not poisonous in front of injustice, you are not a gentleman! The relentless march of Kwak Yeon's martial arts, which kills both Buddha and ancestors, finally begins.
author: Bang Su-yun

title: Volcano Heavenly Horse
description: The leader of the Heavenly Horse Religion, also known as the best in the world, the Absolute Heavenly Horse. He wakes up in a sect due to the Immortal Domination Great Method... "What? Volcano Sect? What kind of nonsense is this?" The story of the great sorcerer who suddenly became a disciple of the Volcano Sect. The declining Volcano Sect begins to rise again.
author: Saya Guest
price: Free if you wait for a day

title: The Third-Rate Martial Artist is the Best in the World
description: "I'm sorry, the best swordsman in the harem. Your talent is too dangerous." He was trying to turn a third-rate martial arts family into a world-class family while serving as a harem man, but he was assassinated. It was definitely like that. "What, why am I eight years old?" The family is third-rate, the talent is the best in the world. Starting life again, this time he will definitely turn the family into the world's number one family!
author: Yuri Son

title: Seoninjiro
description: New work <Seoninjiro> by the author of <Pyewangseong>,<Mui Irang>, <Muihang> starts serialization! 'Dalcheon', who has been studying from a young age and awakened the extreme of martial arts at fifteen. He leaves the mountain and goes out into the world from his master! “What are you going to do. How about setting up a school?” “A school?” “Just like teaching Thousand Character Classic to the kids in the village at a private school.” The boy Dalcheon learns and learns about the world, and at the same time teaches the way of the virtuous person, the way of life! Virtuous person Dalcheon, cultivate the later people and prepare for the turmoil of Joseon!
author: Sonnyonghaeng

title: Manhaengmuseung
description: A boy named Jang Musul, who has an unyielding courage, unfolds a path of justice and discipline with a single sword. It's a new martial arts novel <Manhaengmuseung> by the author of <Pyewangseong>, Boy Haeng. “It means not to yield. It's Musul (無述).” During the violent famine period of the Joseon Dynasty, a boy named Jang Musul was left in a mountain temple due to the brutal poverty. After his parents left the world early, the seven-year-old child who grew up in his aunt's hands now begins to live in the temple with the monks. The big monk who had been watching Musul, who was making the temple noisy with big and small pranks, has Wonmyeong monk teach him martial arts... “He is a child who has the potential to reach the state of enlightenment through martial arts.” Wonmyeong, a martial monk who stayed near the temple, noticed that Musul's ability was extraordinary while teaching him martial arts. This young boy, who can grasp all the actions just by looking at them once, was a natural-born warrior who digests actions better than any warrior in the temple. Wonmyeong senses some destiny from the boy who has compassion, sympathy, and unyielding courage. “This sword comes with a duty from the country. It should be received by someone who is willing to sacrifice his life for the country in any situation.” Wonmyeong hands over the legendary sword 'Saengji', which means deep and wide pond, to Musul. It was a sword handed down by Taejo to be used to protect the country. Young Musul now becomes the sixth owner of Saengji and stands on the path of justice and discipline.
price: Free if you wait for a day

title: 북정기
description: Joseon's Northern Army. They are willing to live by the unchanging rules until the day they die. In the early Joseon period, the most powerful army was the Northern Army. A boy enlisted and became a general and even a prime minister. The Northern Punishment Record of the young man Pilhan! * It was just a sword aimed at the neck of the guy who was running desperately, but the guy collapsed powerless at the precise sword attack. 'One.' Han's sword stabbed the fallen guy's side. A scream was heard. 'Two.' The guy twisted and fell, but a latch fell with him. 'Three.' The neck of the guy who tried to stab Pilhan flew off with a single stroke and fell to the ground.
price: Free if you wait for 1 day

title: Moo In Haeng
description: Before Kim Jae Myung of <Pyewangseong> and Han I-rang of <Moo In I-rang>, there was Moo In Jung Sung Jin! The cornerstone of boy's martial arts novels, <Moo In Haeng>, has returned even more freshly. At the end of spring, rumors began to circulate that a new border guard was being appointed. “It's always the same people coming. Is it the same this time?” “Yes, they're all the same. Every single one of them.” Jung Sung Jin, who was appointed as a border guard protecting the northeastern border, felt a martial energy that was hard to explain in words. Moo In Jung Sung Jin, defeat the Yeojin tribe and rule over Joseon!

title: The Bird That Drinks Tears
description: "They say the bird that drinks tears sings the most beautiful song." A mysterious and fantastical world created by author Lee Young-do, the limit of imagination created by a tightly woven story! A monumental fantasy series by Lee Young-do, equipped with a persistent theme consciousness and fantastical fun.
author: Lee Young-do

title: Service Beverage, Served
description: “I've hired a reliable manager, so I hope you'll run the cafe well with him.” Overnight, Umi, who was a reporter, became unemployed, and her uncle left a short message and left for Hawaii. The problem is, Umi, who is like her father who was a detective, finds cafe life extremely boring. “As a cafe manager, my job is to manage and supervise Ms. Doumi, the only part-timer.” The one who tries to escape the cafe by chasing the case, and the one who tries to stop it. Can Umi and Yeonho successfully manage the 'quiet cafe'? “Service beverage, served. Please tell me your story. I will help you.”
author: Nopimuri

title: Joseon Night Tales
description: "Are you the only crazy one, I'm also Musim from the book alley of Pildong!"_Joseon's best night tale writer 'Musim' "If you want it that much, the survivor should become the king."_Unfortunate prince 'Myung' *** Hongil branch of Gyeongdeok Bookstore 'Musim' She had another job, which was the best night tale writer in Joseon. While thinking about a new work as usual, Musim accidentally comes across a man's firm body, gets inspiration for the novel, and gives birth to her life's masterpiece, 'Ssanghwa Store'. As expected, as soon as the Ssanghwa Store was released, it became a hot topic in the market, and everyone knew about it... One day, 'Hyehwa' from the best gisaeng house in Hanyang, Yeongwolgak, suddenly visits her. Hyehwa asks Musim to write the story she wants... Illustration ⓒMAGGIE Produced by Orange Track (orangetrack@orangetrack.kr)
price: Free if you wait a day

title: Dragon Raja
description: “In order for us, imperfect humans, to interact with the nearly perfect dragon, we need Dragon Raja.” A masterpiece fantasy series by author Lee Young-do, who recorded sales of 2 million copies in Korea, Japan, and Taiwan with infinite imagination, deep worldview, and excellent workmanship!
author: Lee Young-do

title: President of the Night
description: A bloody battle for life involving men connected to the domestic night world and a huge violent organization in Southeast Asia. A long novel depicting the activities of Kim Won-guk, the president of the night.

title: Exorcism Record
description: With a total sales volume of 10 million copies, ranking first in sales volume at bookstores nationwide, and ranking first in the bestseller list in the Korean genre novel field. Even just looking at the records, "Exorcism Record" can easily be recognized as a masterpiece that represents Korean fantasy, along with Lee Woo-hyuk's other works "Chiwoo Cheonwanggi" (6 volumes in total, published by Elixir), "Why War Terminator" (to be published by Elixir). Reverend Park who protects everyone by emitting aura with deep faith, a young man Hyunam who has acquired high-level martial arts by meeting a strange man, a boy Junho who is proficient in talismans and spells with innate spiritual abilities, and Seunghee, a tomboy lady who amplifies the power of the three as the incarnation of the King of Love and Hate. The "Exorcism Record", which deals with the story of four "exorcists" who stand up for people who are marginalized and suffering in a chaotic world, is well known to us. It combines various religions and thoughts such as Taoism, Christianity, secret religion, and shamanism, using ghost stories, legends, and myths as materials, and contains the stories and adventures of four people chasing supernatural and mysterious events.
author: Lee Woo-hyuk

title: The place I ran away to was paradise [19+ Complete Edition]
description: 7 marriages, 5 deaths, 1 divorce. Thanks to the strategic marriages arranged by her uncle, the beautiful Cecilia became wealthier with each marriage. She believed that all the wealth and power she acquired were hers. But it was all an illusion! She realized this fact only when she was accused of poisoning her seventh husband and was about to be executed. She was foolish. She trusted her uncle too much. She never made a decision about her future with her own hands. When she opened her eyes with intense regret, Cecilia found herself back right after her third marriage. Her third husband was Lucel Cardros, the cursed land owner of Lagos. He was a mysterious man who didn't lay a finger on her and readily agreed to her divorce request after 2 years. 'What did this man gain from our marriage?' 'Why did I return to the time right after my marriage with this man?'
author: Haneulgari

title: Does the Mother in a Childcare Novel Have to Die?
description: “I command you, Niyeta King, to marry the princess of the kingdom. You will return to the empire with her.” The moment I became his wife, I remembered my past life. This is a world inside a palace childcare novel, and I was the mother of the female lead. The mother who gives birth to the female lead and dies according to the cliché of childcare novels. I tried to run away because I didn't want to die, but I was caught as soon as I left the stable. “My wife tried to run away.” And that was said by the emperor of the empire, the very person himself. I had no choice but to become the empress. So, I tried to become an unnoticed and abandoned empress. “We must sleep in the same bed. You and I.” But why on earth is the emperor in my palace! Don't you have anything else to do? The empress dowager cries whenever she sees me, reminding her of her youth. The emperor keeps nagging me not to visit the empress dowager. I tried to reconcile the bad relationship between the two, but……. “If he treats you badly, tell me secretly. Then I will help you in any way.” The empress dowager, who has regained her son's love, said so. “I've never been attached to anyone. But I keep looking at you.” Why is this handsome emperor suddenly looking at me with sparkling eyes……. I really want to run away. If I have a baby with this man, everyone will be happy except me. But why can't I leave this man who whispers that he is lonely?
author: Tototata

title: I'm Not Sorry, But The Prince Will Marry Me Anyway
description: I possessed the body of a lady who is destined to marry the prince. I'm not happy about it. The prince is a villain who harasses the heroine while ignoring his fiancée, and gets kicked out by the original male lead. In the end, he apologizes to his fiancée and gets married. That's all there is to it. Well, he's handsome but his personality is twisted. He's the third prince, so he doesn't have to worry about ruling the country. He's a decent husband. Go ahead and run wild. You're going to marry me anyway. I'll just sit back and watch your dark history unfold! “Dori Redfield. Don't expect me to ask you to dance at this ball. Maybe not even at the next one, or the one after that.” “Yes, go ahead.” “We may be engaged but……. ……Huh?” “Our parents made a joke about us getting married. You don't have to worry about it, Your Highness. I'm really okay.” “Is that……so? So, long, isn't it?” Why are you flustered, prince? You started the nonsense. Did your conscience die? But this guy asks a really conscienceless question. “……Do you, by any chance, have another man?” What is this guy who harassed the original heroine saying now! Hold it in. This guy will regret it later. All I have to do is stay a humble fiancée until then! “What are you talking about. What man would-” “What? Who dares to say that?” ……It's you in the original. This guy is weird. The problem is not just him. “My cute little sister Dori, your dress today is also terrible. No wonder there are rumors that you were dumped by His Highness.” “I can't help it. His Highness is too good for me.” “……Wait. Too good? Who said that. Did you really get dumped?” The original villainess and my sister, Natalie, suddenly takes an interest in my love life. Why are the trash from the original story growling at me!
author: Gangryeokhan Doraji
price: Free if you wait for a day

title: Rewriting the Marriage Contract [Complete Version for 19+]
description: Princess Raniakea, who is looked down upon for her weak spiritual power, always dreamed of escaping the contempt directed at her. One day, a marriage proposal came from the empire. The other party was Hyperion, the first prince with no support base. Raniakea gladly accepted the proposal. She didn't care who the other party was as long as she could leave her country. * Before the wedding, Raniakea saw the marriage contract offered to her. [The two will have __ times of intercourse for the succession on __.] Fortunately, that clause remained blank and they got married. As expected, her husband only had a few meals with her a year and did not stay in the palace, but returned to the border. This continued for 3 years. She thought she could live quietly like this and leave the palace when one of the other princes ascended to the throne... * “Death of the 2nd, 3rd, 4th Princes!” Amidst everyone's shock, Hyperion, who returned to the palace, quickly sorted out the chaos and ascended to the throne. What the newly crowned emperor needed was a sturdy empress who could help strengthen his imperial power. 'So he will divorce me and remarry a young lady from a powerful family.' That's what she thought.... “You were looking for me....” “Yes. Because I have a favor to ask you.” With a serious face as if he had made up his mind, Raniakea swallowed dryly at the sight of Hyperion. 'Finally, it's here.' “I know what you want. Don't worry. I plan to follow what you want.” “...Is that so?” She had no doubt that they were thinking the same thing. “Let's sign the divorce agreement quickly.” “It doesn't matter if it's a son or a daughter, let's have a child quickly.” Only then did Raniakea realize. Her husband had been hoping for something completely different.
author: Baekseolhong
price: Free if you wait for a day

title: Became the Youngest Sister-in-law of the Decadent Reverse Harem Male Leads
description: I was reincarnated into a decadent reverse harem with no dreams or hopes, but for some reason, the female lead died. The shock of the original work disappearing was only temporary. The sisters started connecting with the male leads. The playful, obsessive emperor has a mature and affectionate older sister. The blunt world's strongest swordsman has a lively second sister. The playboy genius wizard has a cynical youngest sister. Me? I'm only six years old, so if I had a love line, it would be ridiculous. Anyway, the sisters got along well with the male leads and held a wedding ceremony. But……. “Liliana. Call me brother.” The youngest brother-in-law captures my heart with a brilliant illusion magic and asks. “Among the brothers-in-law, I'm your favorite, right?” The swordsman brother-in-law asks me sneakily while giving me a ride. “It's a royal decree. The youngest sister-in-law will live in the palace and be treated like a princess.” The emperor brother-in-law says, and the oldest sister nods as if it's obvious. I just want to go back to the time when the four of us were living together, okay? #Childcare #Affectionate #ThisAbility #TinyFemaleLead #ChildhoodFriendMaleLead #TheCoolestSistersInTheWorld #ThreeBrothersInLaw #BrotherInLaw1(Emperor) #BrotherInLaw2(Swordsman) #BrotherInLaw3(GeniusWizard)
author: Madrum

title: Strange but Effective Villainess Life
description: Kiana, the troublemaker of the Prelai Dukedom. She tried to give up her villainess life and be reborn as a new person. Until one day, her family was executed for treason. 'There's no need to kill me, who only did research in the countryside after running away 7 years ago!' The academy, which treated me like a family and called me a once-in-a-lifetime genius, betrayed me, and the moment I realized that the treason was a false charge by someone. With a mysterious power, I went back to a year ago! "I can't help it. Now that it's come to this, the smart and ambitious me has no choice but to save the dukedom." There are two things to do for the family. “Because someday I will be helpful to my brother?” “I tried to save you because you are precious to my grandfather.” Recovering the messed-up relationship with the family who were like bean flour, and, “Please pretend to be in a relationship with me externally.” Holding hands with 'that man'. Oh, before that. I poured a water bottle over the headmaster's head during the lecture and said, “This is gravity.” First, take revenge on the academy guys who have no virtue. The <Strange but Effective Villainess Life> of Kiana, who has become smarter and more vicious.

title: The Return of Namgung's Granddaughter
description: I thought I was abandoned, but I was the child that Namgung had been looking for a long time. When I was about to be killed by the blood horse who I used to call my master, I found out the truth and woke up again as a thirteen-year-old child, I decided to return to Namgung. I didn't want to be recognized as a family. I just wanted to prevent Namgung from being destroyed in vain as before.... "The whip and silk, gold bars, and elixir that the family head gave to the young lady." "Here, kid. This is my return gift for you." As soon as I was recognized as the lost granddaughter of Namgung, I got delicious food, precious clothes, gold and silver treasures, and a good sword! I got a grandfather and father who cry and laugh for me. What is this ticklish and warm feeling I feel every time? To protect the smiles of those I killed with my own hands, to keep this ticklish and warm feeling for a long time, I'm trying to change the future dyed in blood differently from my past life.... * * * A shadow fell on Namgung Mucheon's face. 'Was this child really raised as a killer.' The deep murderous intent and the swordsmanship, which is essential for a killer, contained her life. 'Damn bastard.' Anger surged up in Namgung Mucheon. He was about to spit out a nasty curse, but he swallowed it because it was in front of his granddaughter. 'How dare you try to raise my granddaughter as a killer?' The blue energy surrounding Namgung Mucheon became more intense. The eun's long martial arts romance fantasy novel <The Return of Namgung's Granddaughter>
author: The eun
price: Free if you wait for a day

title: Being a Maid Was Better Than Being a Princess
description: Siana was a princess of a small kingdom. Until the imperial army invaded... Just before her neck was about to be cut off by the cruel crown prince, Siana screamed, “Save me!” She begged with a desperate voice towards the beautiful face of the crown prince smeared with red blood. “I have many skills learned in the palace. Wouldn't I be perfect to serve as a maid?” Thus, Siana became a probationary maid in the imperial palace. But surprisingly, the work suits her?! When she sweeps, the corridors become clean, when she kneads the flour dough, sweet cookies are baked, and when she does the laundry, the blankets become white and fragrant! Siana did her best as a maid, and the royal family slowly began to open their hearts to her. “The tea you brewed is always the best." “You made this dress? It's really beautiful.” “I want to entrust the prince's education to you.” But she never intended to capture this man's heart... "I feel the same." "......" “I can't live without you, Siana." At the affectionate voice of the crown prince, Siana closed her eyes tightly. Your Majesty, I want to live as an ordinary maid!
author: Kim Boppy
price: Free if you wait for 1 day

title: The Strongest Family Has Arrived!
description: A man named Ryan, who has been falsely accused of being a mass murderer, has finished his 12-year prison term. He was sharpening his knife for revenge when he was released. "I'm the daughter of Confucius." "......What nonsense." He had a daughter waiting for him...? "Ah, Dad!" "Hey, do you want to die? Why am I your father." *** "I'm going to take revenge on my father." The strongest father(?) Ryan, who hides his power and seeks revenge, and "I'll help you. Let's take revenge together." The daughter(?) Bania, who hides a secret and helps with revenge. The fake mother and daughter, who were abandoned by their family, succeed in revenge and rise from nothing to become the strongest family in the empire! <The Strongest Family Has Arrived!>
author: Go Eun Chae
price: Free if you wait for a day

title: The Male Leads Trapped in Our House
description: I reincarnated as the heiress of a wealthy family in a novel. The problem is that this world is about to be destroyed by virus monsters. All that will be left is money, so I quickly bought a mansion in the countryside to create a refuge from the monsters... But the world ended much faster than I expected, XX! * Plus, somehow the male leads ended up trapped in our house. But they don't seem to want to leave our house. Why don't they even think about going to the female lead? “What the hell are you?” “You seem to be someone who knew the world was going to end.” They were curious about me, but I couldn't answer. They wouldn't believe me anyway, right? To me, they are just a good labor resource. “Let's start working. Earn your keep!” The end of this hellish time is finding the cure for the virus, the cause of the world's destruction. So let's endure by making the male leads work until then! * But there's one problem. The old mansion I bought turns out to be quite suspicious. What the hell is happening in our house?
author: Kim Ji Ah

title: X's Circumstances
description: The whole world has abandoned you. A loner, a barmaid's daughter, a gold digger obsessed with money. I didn't want to let go. You, who had nowhere to reach out. I wanted you madly. You, who wouldn't bend to anything. Even if I had to defile you. Even if I had to turn my back on the whole world. *** Start-up CEO Shin Ije is about to have an M&A with a large company and reunites with his ex-girlfriend. With Lim Hara from 'The On', a labor law firm who came to him on a commission. But she, who tore him apart and disappeared, came back with an indifferent face and turned his insides upside down. “I don't remember, it was too long ago.” “As long as you're living well now.” Hoo, Shin Ije, who exhaled a burning breath, roughly ran his fingers through his hair. What do you know. What do you know, Lim Hara, to blabber so carelessly. To a creature barely breathing after being shattered.
author: Seol Li Yeon

title: The Baby Ball of the White Tiger Clan
description: Juksoya, the youngest daughter of the Phoenix Clan, is declared a fake daughter overnight. “Take out her spirit nucleus and lock her in the cold palace.” She was hurt by the cold treatment and persecution of her family, but it was okay. Because she was the bad baby bird who deceived her family and made them sad. “Please get rid of that child.” But that didn't mean she was okay with death. * “What is this, a ball of fluff.” The one who saved Soya in a crisis was a ferocious tiger... no, the head of the White Tiger Clan. “I think I need to steal you, ball of fluff.” Soya accepts the suspicious proposal and goes to the land of the White Tiger. She tried to live without attracting attention here, but the people of the White Tiger Clan are a bit strange? “Don't worry and stay here for a while, it's not troublesome at all.” The head of the clan, famous for his ferocity, was overly kind. “Call me brother, Soya.” “Me too! I'm your brother now, ball of fluff!” The White Tiger princes compete to claim brotherhood. And what's stranger than anything... “You're so cute, our little ball of fluff!” “Hmph! You don't have such a cute ball of fluff in your house, do you?” ‘They think I'm cute? Not worthless and horrible?’  #ChildcareStory #OrientalStyle #BeastmanStory #HealingStory #GrowthStory #BabyBirdFemaleLead #AbilityGirl #AffectionateMan #PureMan #AbilityMan #FamilyRegretStory #JusticePrevailsOverEvil
author: Ggul-ggi
price: Free if you wait for a day

title: Temptation of Brother's Friend
description: Growing up like a greenhouse flower among her older brother and his friends, Lee Seo has never dated anyone due to their overprotectiveness. Feeling frustrated about not experiencing a relationship, Lee Seo impulsively proposes to her brother's friend, Tae In. “Brother, teach me how to kiss.” The kiss with him made Lee Seo feel distant. From that day on, her heart flutters whenever she sees Tae In, and he even ends up staying at her house for a while... *** “We haven’t properly started our kissing practice.” “...Brother.” “Come to my room every night from now on.” Tae In's deep eyes were filled with an unknown hot heat. “I... trust you. You won’t do anything dangerous...” “If you knew what I was thinking, you wouldn’t say that.” As his gaze slid over every corner of her face, Lee Seo swallowed her dry saliva.
author: Traveler

title: The Top Student Hides His Regression
description: Kang Da-Hye, a long-term unemployed person living an ordinary failed life, regresses to 11 years ago. “I've become a high school student again!” I have to take the college entrance exam again and go to college! It's a great gain. I will live really hard in this life. I will get all the college entrance exams right. I will get a job in the last semester after entering Korea University. I will earn money and buy stocks and coins in advance. But while living hard with such a mind, boys keep bothering me from the side. “Kang Da-Hye. I hate you the second most in our class.” Jung Eun-Sung, who was in that place when I regressed. The main vocal of a boy idol group that debuts a year later and becomes a huge hit. “Da-Hye, have you seen where Ji-Soo is?” Seo Jae-Kyeom, who I had a crush on at this time. The illegitimate child of a chaebol family where my mother worked as a helper. Although the two are incredibly handsome, what do I know. My life, which is definitely ruined 11 years later, is more important to me now. But. “You know everything. Then you must know how much I like you.” “Can't you like me again? I was wrong......” As always, life does not go as planned. Guys, I have to study...... #Regression #School #RomCom #Growth #FirstLove #MutualSalvation
author: Yoo Ji Min

title: I'm an Unknown Actress, But Everyone Knows Me
description: "Was it you who pushed me down the stairs that time... Dokyeoul?" No matter how hard I tried, I couldn't even debut, let alone succeed. I thought it was all my fault. [Even though you tried your best, the situation didn't improve, right? Well, was it really your fault?] But the truth was different. "Yeoreum, you look so ugly right now..." [Due to an error, your 〈Lucky〉 points have been transferred to someone else for 10 years.] All my frustrations and failures were because of you, Dokyeoul. I couldn't reach my goal of becoming an actress because of you. I realized this through the status window that appeared before my eyes when I was dying. But then, as if it was a lie- "...What is this?" [♣From an unknown actress to a national actress!♣ Let's make your unknown name widely known. Try to be reborn as an actress that will never be seen again in history.] I went back to when I was twenty. A time when I could change everything. ** 'This time, I won't be pushed out by Dokyeoul's connections.' "Hello, I'm Han Yeoreum, here for the model interview today." So I went to find the person who will become the best photographer in Korea in the future, "Then, I'll start acting." I auditioned for the lead role in a drama that will become the hottest topic. I took back everything that she had taken from me one by one. And then. -He, Jegal Lok... He said he would attend the preview. The biggest names in the entertainment industry started to notice me. ** "But, Yeoreum." My classmate, and before the regression, a triple ten million actor. Myung Jeha smiled faintly with his handsome face and said, "It's strange.... It's your first play today, but you seem to have memorized all the lines...." Ding-! [Name: Myung Jeha] Level: A Star Who Will Live Forever At that moment, I realized. "I'll listen to your prepared lies next time." That the man in front of me was also a regressor. #EntertainmentIndustry #AbilityFemaleLead #ActressFemaleLead #GrowthFemaleLead #RefreshingFemaleLead
author: Krutmil
price: Free if you wait for a day

title: The Call from the Giant Now
description: Hong Hee-joo, a sign language interpreter who has shut her mouth due to severe anger disorder. Three years of strategic marriage. It's been three years living without a conversation with her husband. One day, when resignation was a daily routine, Hee-joo gets caught by a hostage criminal...! 'Don't hang up, don't hang up the phone! This is not voice phishing...!' But the husband, who is worse than others, coldly hangs up the phone. -Contact me when the body comes out. Bad guy, really bad guy! Hee-joo, whose anger has exploded, threatens her husband directly while hiding her identity. The problem is, he is a spokesperson for the Blue House, famous for his vitriol. -Don't you threaten me on time? “No...” -We are waiting without eating because we are threatened by the blackmailer. “What...” -Are you having fun with another guy while I'm not here? “...Yes?” Wait, is that the sociopath husband I knew?
author: Geoneomulnyeo

title: Beloved Madman
description: There are various kinds of madmen in the world. Selfish, reckless, psycho, desperado, obsessive, pervert, etc. As far as Soo-in knows, he was an obsessive pervert psycho who fit all these types. The madman has returned. “Finally, we meet.” “Adult Lee Soo-in.” Like a starving investigator who has been hungry for a long time, without hiding his sticky hunger. “Job change?” “I wish this secretary could help.” Chairman Woo Il-hwa, not knowing his son's inner thoughts, changes the job of Secretary Soo-in to his secretary, and Soo-in is inevitably exposed to him who is eyeing her greedily……. “Wait, Lee Soo-in.” During the 11 years of exile, Jae-hee dreamed of only one thing. A relationship as a proper adult, not a minor with many restrictions. If you want, you can do it as much as you want. Therefore, although Soo-in is as hard as steel, her playfulness is activated when she faces her. “What do you want, really?” “You.” “Lee Soo-in.” However, it is said that Soo-in is flirting with some bastard. His jealousy and obsession explode…. “Don't go a step.” “If you don't want to make me a madman.” What? You were originally a madman.  Illustrator : BADegg
author: Park Ji Young
price: Free if you wait a day

title: Don't Expect Love
description: "Live as if you're dead while spending my money." For some reason, Ki Chae-heon, who was suffering from distrust of women, needed a deceptive marriage for equity succession. He chooses a woman with many flaws and a difficult family as his bride. "Miss Yu Yeon-ah, you can't expect anything from me except money. Living like a dead person, that's the wife I want." "Like a dead person..." The low voice was sharply thrown, but the person who was hit was just calm. No, was it his illusion that it seemed somewhat satisfactory somewhere? They will share the same space but will not infringe on each other's territory. It was a rational combination tangled with interests. Regardless of the strange attitude of the woman who looked strange somehow. A woman who lives happily as if she's dead(?) and a man who cares about such a woman. That's how the strange married life began.
author: Woo Ah-jin

title: Home, Bitter Home : Motel California
description: “Will you sleep with me? I wish I was your first.” On the last night of her nineteen, Ji Gang-hee, a bold girl from H town, asked. “My first is... you. Whenever that is. So, I'll wait.” Cheon Yeon-su, a pure boy from H town, answered at the end of his teens. She couldn't mortgage the rest of her life in a place that's not Seoul. Day by day, like measuring the slow growth of a child, she crossed out the dates until the first day of her twenties, Gang-hee escaped from H town. Longing for her body's moisture to be 'Arisu' full of minerals, not the groundwater of H town. 12 years after leaving H town. The car woman stained with fine dust and exhaust fumes occasionally misses the servant of H town. On the last day of his nineteen, Yeon-su's world was divided into two. The world with Gang-hee and the world without her. He wanted to live a lifetime with our beloved 'Gang-hee' in a picture-like house on that blue meadow. 12 years since Gang-hee left for Seoul with an empty can at the bus terminal. Even when treating a calf, even when putting down a foot-and-mouth disease vaccine, he occasionally misses Gang-hee. #Cover Illustration: Kim Dan-woo
author: Shim Yun Seo

title: Limits of Obsession [Complete Edition for 19+]
description: “I'm... not a very interesting woman. I don't know how to entertain men...” “Is that what you're worried about, Yesuh?” Kanghyun asked, calling her name as if sighing. “Don't worry about such things.” You're not a boring woman. You don't even know how much joy you bring me. When the woman who used to resist softly showed a face full of fear, he couldn't take his eyes off her. Kanghyun, more interested than ever, twisted his lips in front of the woman's face filled with depth. “What to do. You'll end up only looking at me.” Her white skin was clear even up close. He slowly raised his hand and touched her cheek. Her soft skin, like a baby's, slipped through his fingers. Her black eyes were even more moist and dark up close. If his words just now came true and she ended up looking at him with those eyes. “I really can't stand it.” I can't help it, Jinyesuh. It's inevitable, so you have to adapt. I've wanted you so much since the first day I saw you.
author: Biseol

title: The Sickly Beauty is My Crazy Younger Brother
description: One day, without any warning, I was possessed by a BL novel. Moreover, I became Rowen, a trashy sub-character who interfered with the relationship between the adopted main character and his brother, and received the wrath of the readers! To avoid being killed as in the original work, he tries his best to be good to his brother... “Go away! What am I, a baby?! I'm 13 now!” He was supposed to be a sickly beauty, so why did he become such a crazy person? “Didn't you promise me then?” “...What promise?” “That you would stay by my side. Don't tell me you weren't serious?” Moreover, the main character also starts to interpret his words as having a deeper meaning. Why are you guys like this? Please, you two should be in love!
author: Chaedonopseongi
price: Free if you wait a day

title: About Possessing a Sickly Villain [BL]
description: I possessed the sickly older brother of the main character in the 19-rated BL novel 《Gray》. The problem is that he is a villain who torments the main character and disappears without a trace after fawning over the protagonist. In such cases, the best is the amnesia cliché that can occur out of context without asking or discussing. “I only remember my name. Baek Jin-gyeom.” But the reactions are strange. It's not going as I expected? “Do you really want to find your memory?” Baek Jin-woo, who seems to not want to reveal that he's looking for his memory. “Are you not interested in me now?” The main character, Tak Won-beom, who should have been disgusted rather than interested. “I thought of you even when I went home yesterday.” The sub-character, Sun Soo-hyuk, who keeps approaching. ……Is this possession okay?
author: Ham's Potato

title: Wild Card [BL][Complete Edition for 19+]
description: Shin Seong-ha, a pitcher struggling in the minor leagues, becomes entangled with Woo Seung-gun, a major league star pitcher he idolized. But rather than being excited and happy about this dreamlike relationship, he is more worried. "I wish you could stay at the top, senior." "..." "So we can't date. I hope you just play baseball, senior." Baseball over romance. He didn't want Woo Seung-gun, who was showing the peak of baseball, to have any fluctuations because of him. But Woo Seung-gun was tenacious. "Was our bed scene not good for you?" "...What?" "We weren't bad. You were crazy about me then..." "No, what are you talking about!" He tried to start a relationship with him after many twists and turns, but a terrible incident hits the two. Despite repeated regressions, he can't prevent Woo Seung-gun's death. Eventually, after three regressions, Seong-ha goes back three years. To save Woo Seung-gun, he tries to erase the relationship itself and aims to leap as a batter, not a failed pitcher. G Wagon's long BL novel <Wild Card> #CrazyForBaseballPitcher #BallWithSecret #SwitchHitterPitcher #LeftHandFireballerBall #CuteAndPrettyPitcher #ArrogantButGeniusBall #FindTheCriminal #BaseballStory #Mystery #RegressionStory
author: G Wagon

title: [BL] Challenge! S-Class Idol
description: Ye-jun, a member of the failed idol group 'B-DAY', suddenly dies in a hit-and-run accident. After realizing his own death, Ye-jun thought he would naturally go to the afterlife, but then he hears from a suddenly appearing system that if he succeeds in debuting in a novel, he will be revived. Moreover, he is given the opportunity to debut as another popular group by turning back time to 5 years ago. He decides to possess the novel he read a few years ago. Ye-jun, who entered the novel, struggles alone to achieve his goal, but it's not easy. He thought he would naturally enter the body of 'Jung Ji-on', the protagonist of this novel, but he possessed the body of a villain with the same name as him. Still, he can't go back to the gates of the afterlife, so he tries hard, but he is assigned to the lowest class 'Class 4' in the personal evaluation, and due to the ridiculous ability of 'villain Ji Ye-jun', Ye-jun unintentionally makes mistakes in every competition. Can Ye-jun succeed in joining the debut group and return to the desired time.
author: So Hye-jun

title: The villainous Omega wants to escape from the drama [19 years old complete version]
description: I possessed the role of a young mother-in-law in a BL web drama that my sister used to watch. No, why am I, a man, a mother-in-law? And why is my daughter-in-law also a man?! What is Omega Verse and what is a heat cycle?! A romantic comedy(?) where Daehangeon tries various attempts to escape from the messed up Omega Verse drama. *** “Why are you so careless today. It's not like you.” ‘Eek.’ I almost screamed on the spot. Mother-in-law, mother-in-law! It was an unbelievable word that came out of the mouth of a man who is taller than me. “It's not something for Haejung to worry about.” “Haejung?” Haejung's low voice was filled with confusion. I shut my mouth with an 'oops'. ‘Did I get the title wrong?’ Haejung was still staring at me with his arms crossed. Would it be an illusion that the faint light seemed to flicker in his deep black eyes. #DramaPossession #VillainPossession #TrashyDrama #OmegaVerse #PassionateOmega #DominantAlpha * This work is a complete version for 19 years old and over. Please refer to it when viewing.
author: Bori Suyeom
price: Free if you wait a day

title: I Think the Old Man Likes Me [Complete Edition for 19+]
description: After being together for 5 years as neighbors and 2 years as lovers, Ye-bon was dumped by his older boyfriend, who even insulted and slapped him. In his resentment, he vents his anger to a man who stares at him, but that man seems to be a gangster... a thug for sure...! “Hey.” His voice seemed to smell of cigarettes. It was a rough and terribly low voice that seemed to crawl on the damp floor. The man was so tall that Ye-bon had to tilt his head uncomfortably to meet his gaze. “You shouldn't say things like hitting someone carelessly.” Ye-bon slowly opened his tightly closed mouth and asked. “...Why?” The man, who glanced at Ye-bon filled with caution, put his hand on Ye-bon's shoulder and drew his face closer. A strong musk scent and a sharp smell seemed to wrap around Ye-bon's neck. “Because it's a waste to let it go, you're too good-looking.” It's promising.
author: Eoleummeonji
price: Free if you wait a day

title: December [BL][19+ Complete Edition]
description: *This work is an AU version (Omega Bus Universe) of <July>. Please refer to this when reading. It is separate from <July> and can be read without having seen <July>. *Please note that this work includes an extra story. On the morning of December 31st, I met a runaway boy next to a fallen motorcycle. “Did you run away?” “Damn it.” “Are you an Alpha?” “How... did you know?” “Well, just.” “Are you... an Omega?” Yeonwoo, who briefly helped the Alpha boy as tall as himself. His own pain was too great to remember the brief help. After taking a leave of absence from school as if running away from the bad things about the Woosung Alpha, he accidentally meets an Alpha in the library when he returns after 3 years. The very strong Alpha that he was so reluctant about. Tall height, a pleasant pheromone that seems to be enchanting. He keeps approaching Yeonwoo. “Don't you go to school?” “I'm on leave. How about you, Yeonwoo?” “Me too. I'm planning to return next year.” “Which school?” “W University.” Surprise slowly appeared on his face. A low voice that seemed to suppress some emotion was heard. “You were my senior.” #Emotion>Event #NoConflict Illustration By Meljy Title Design By SAN
author: samk

title: [BL] The Emperor's Dog [Complete Edition for 19+]
description: Emperor Elector, who has exhausted his life and closed his eyes, woke up as Merwell Humanjack, the knight of the Grand Duke Vero, the hunting dog he used to raise. “You must not let me find out that you are the emperor.” Staring at the beautiful wall that was almost transparent, Merwell chewed on the cigarette filter in his mouth. He barely held the cigarette with his stiff fingers and opened his mouth. “...What happens if you find out?” His expression, which was always cold, changed at that sound. He opened his mouth with a smirk. “I plan to violate you.” “.......” Was the dog I raised a mad dog?
author: Black Sesame Rice Cake

title: Bless You, Bless Me [BL] [Complete Edition for 19+]
description: --I've always wanted this man. Yoo Hyun-jin, a promising young priest of the Je Yang Kingdom. He has been in love with the youngest son of the prestigious Hyun family, Hyun Tae-oh, for a long time. However, knowing well that it is an unattainable heart, he has devoted himself to theology and is on the path to success, with the official priesthood in sight. One night, a drinking party is held to welcome Bishop Hyun Tae-oh, who has returned to the capital from a conflict area after 7 years, and Hyun-jin, who went to pick up his drunken brother, accidentally loses his clothes and waits for his clothes to be washed in a side room of a restaurant, unable to wear even a single piece of clothing. And next to him is the naked Hyun Tae-oh, who fell unconscious without greeting. The next morning, Hyun Tae-oh, who woke up, misunderstands what happened the night before when he sees the two of them, and Hyun-jin, who secretly liked him since childhood, impulsively makes a joke that Hyun Tae-oh attacked him in his drunkenness. But before he can explain that it was a joke, Hyun Tae-oh seriously takes responsibility for making the priest's body impure and rushes at him, and the situation spirals out of control as Hyun Tae-oh, the fiance of the princess of Je Yang Kingdom, unexpectedly breaks off the long-standing marriage talks with the royal family...... What will be the outcome of the pure night between the most cold-blooded strategist Hyun Tae-oh and the most naive Yoo Hyun-jin of Je Yang Kingdom.
author: Yoo Woo-ji

title: The Only Omega in the Alpha Family
description: Lee Jung-in, who I met at an orphanage when I was young, had the same name and birthday as me. The only difference was that he was the only omega in a chaebol family. But after a car accident, when I opened my eyes, I was possessed by Lee Jung-in. [This body. You take it, Choi Jung-in.] Jung-in, who took in the sentence written on the first line of the discovered notebook, was breathless. We used to joke about it. I was envious of Lee Jung-in, who was free because he had no family, and he was envious of me, who had no money worries and many brothers. But how on earth...? He's not a magician or a wizard, so how can he change bodies just because he wants to? “It's dangerous, baby.” “Jung-in. Be careful.” “Little one. I'll take you to the room. Wrap your arm around my neck.” I heard that the alpha family considered Lee Jung-in, who was born as an omega, a disgrace, but the brothers' attitudes were a bit strange. And that wasn't the only strange thing. “Who the hell did this.” “Ah......” “I asked. Who touched you, Lee Jung-in.” Lee Jung-in even had a fiancé. Moreover, a very kind alpha fiancé with extreme right-wing tendencies. 'Jung-in, please tell me. Were all the words you said to me lies?' ▶A little taste “Um...... Beom-hyun.” - Yes. “Do you want to play a game?” Jung-in, who smiled self-mockingly, put his forearm over his eyes, which were heated by the tears, and said, “Even if I'm ugly, poor, have no family, and my trait is... beta. Would you have liked me?” - Yes, I would have. Jung-in, who opened his trembling lips, closed his eyes at Beom-hyun's voice, which continued with certainty. - Don't worry, Jung-in. No matter what you look like, no matter where you are, I'll find you and love you the most in the world. His anxious heart was gradually regaining stability through the conversation with Beom-hyun. - I love you, Jung-in. I'll take your anxiety. You just smile happily. Listening to the sweet voice whispering in his ear like a dream, Jung-in fell into a deep sleep. For a very long time, until the new day dawned, the phone did not turn off. Modern, Omega verse, strong attack, affectionate attack, devoted attack, tsundere attack, love attack, obsessive attack, mad attack, chaebol attack, lascivious attack, handsome attack, beautiful defense, affectionate defense, bright defense, silly defense, pushover defense, strong inside but soft outside defense, neat defense, chaebol defense, sickly defense, amnesiac defense, school/campus, friends>lovers, first love, contract, misunderstanding/mistake, politics/society/chaebol, jealousy, soul swap, mystery/occult, sweet, slapstick, daily life, healing
author: Gaudium
